Class BasePlayer

java.lang.Object
character.BasePlayer
Direct Known Subclasses:
CatPlayer, DogPlayer
public abstract class BasePlayer extends Object
Abstract base class for all playable characters. Manages HP and sprite loading. Subclasses must implement six abstract methods to define their unique identity, ability, and factory method.

Ability contract: if ability() causes isPerfectAimReady() to return true, Controller will lock the projectile angle and then call resetAbilityEffect().

  • Constructor Details

    • BasePlayer

      protected BasePlayer(int maxHp, int startHp)
      Loads the sprite image and initialises HP.
      Parameters:
      maxHp - maximum HP
      startHp - starting HP

  • Method Details

    • ability

      public abstract void ability()
      Activates this character's special ability.

    • getName

      public abstract String getName()
      Returns:
      display name shown in the HUD (e.g. "Dog")

    • getAbilityLabel

      public abstract String getAbilityLabel()
      Returns:
      short label shown on the ability button (e.g. "HEAL")

    • getAbilityType

      public abstract AbilityType getAbilityType()
      Returns:
      the AbilityType for colour-coding the ability button

    • getSpritePath

      public abstract String getSpritePath()
      Returns:
      classpath resource path to the character's sprite image

    • recreate

      public abstract BasePlayer recreate()
      Returns:
      a fresh instance of this character with full HP (used for Rematch)

    • isPerfectAimReady

      public boolean isPerfectAimReady()
      Returns:
      true if Cat's perfect-aim is ready; false by default

    • resetAbilityEffect

      public void resetAbilityEffect()
      Clears the perfect-aim flag after the angle has been applied. No-op by default.

    • getSprite

      public javafx.scene.image.Image getSprite()
      Returns:
      the loaded sprite Image, or null if loading failed

    • getHp

      public int getHp()
      Returns:
      current HP

    • getMaxHp

      public int getMaxHp()
      Returns:
      maximum HP

    • setHp

      public void setHp(int h)
      Parameters:
      h - new HP value

    • decreaseHp

      public void decreaseHp(int damage)
      Parameters:
      damage - HP amount to subtract
